name: development-team
description: OpenCode AI development team — deploy a complete agent team with `dev-team init`

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const{cpSync,existsSync,mkdirSync}=require('fs');const{resolve}=require('path');const src=resolve('src/opencode');const dst=resolve('dist/opencode');if(existsSync(dst))require('fs').rmSync(dst,{recursive:true});mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});console.log('Template copied to dist/opencode/')"
